visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women, one in a pink sweater and one in a white bucket hat, stand behind a shopping cart in a Costco warehouse. They wave at the camera while large red and yellow graphic text overlays the top and bottom of the screen. Bright warehouse lighting illuminates the background, where other shoppers and tall shelves are visible. (2) A rapid montage begins, starting with a 18.9-inch bear decoration dressed in traditional red Chinese attire holding a lantern. The camera remains static on the object while price text overlays appear in the center. (3) The sequence cuts through various grocery items: vacuum-packed chicken breast, plastic-wrapped beef slices, and trays of duck meat. Each shot is a close-up or medium shot of the product on a refrigerated shelf, accompanied by large red and yellow price stickers. (4) The focus shifts to the beverage section, showing rows of red wine bottles and stacks of blue Chivas Regal whiskey boxes. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the branding on the packaging. (5) A series of snack and dry good shots follow, featuring stacks of Crown crackers, Kirin beer boxes, and bags of Cheetos and Ruffles. The camera captures these items in their bulk packaging on warehouse pallets. (6) The montage continues with frozen seafood (shrimp), pork knuckles, and large boxes of milk powder. The final shots feature frozen desserts like Häagen-Dazs ice cream and decorative lucky tree potted plants arranged in a row near the exit.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators at the start of the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one wears a beige/pink long-sleeve top with long black hair, the other wears a black top and a white New York Yankees bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, featuring high metal shelving, refrigerated display cases, pallets of bulk goods, and warehouse lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with a high-energy, fast-paced male narrator announcing 'Costco this week's special report!' accompanied by bright, rhythmic electronic dance music. The voice is enthusiastic and projected, using a rising intonation typical of promotional broadcasts. (2) As the visual montage begins, the narrator lists items and prices with extreme speed, saying 'New Year bear decoration special price 999... Thirteen spice chicken breast 210...'. Each product name is enunciated clearly despite the high speech rate. (3) The BGM continues as a steady, high-tempo underscore with synth pulses and a driving electronic beat. There are no pauses in the vocal delivery as the speaker moves from liquor to snacks, maintaining a constant high arousal level. (4) The final segment maintains the same hyper-edited pace. The narrator lists household staples and holiday gifts like 'New Zealand milk powder 529' and 'Money tree plant 1200'. The track ends abruptly as the visual transitions to the final logo, with no fade out.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a rapid-fire promotional advertisement for Costco's New Year sales event in Taiwan. By using a 'special report' format with high-energy narration, fast visual cuts, and prominent price overlays, it aims to quickly inform members of a wide variety of discounted items—from groceries and liquor to home decor—to drive foot traffic during the holiday season.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is a promotional showcase of Costco products and their specific discounted prices, including the store's logo and sale dates.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a very high information density, typical of social media marketing aimed at grabbing attention quickly. The synchronized fast cuts between visual and audio maintain a high level of engagement throughout the 87 seconds.
